intro.hr: Šest stilskih slika za mirnu večer: ne kao popis boca i cigara, nego kao način razmišljanja o težini, slatkoći, dimu, kiselini i tempu.
intro.en: Six style sketches for a quiet evening: not a list of bottles and cigars, but a way to think about weight, sweetness, smoke, acidity and pace.

body.hr:
Ovaj arhetip radi kad večer traži svjetlo, ali ne prazno. Connecticut wrapper donosi kremu, sijeno, badem i blagi cedar; amontillado odgovara orašastom suhoćom, slanom niti i diskretnom oksidacijom. Zajedno čine pairing koji ne viče. Najbolji je u prvoj polovici večeri, prije teške hrane ili nakon lagane večere.

Kako ga složiti
• Cigara — blaga do srednja snaga, svijetli wrapper, format koji ne traje predugo i ne grije se brzo.
• Piće — suhi amontillado ili srodni oksidativni sherry, blago ohlađen, u manjoj čaši.
• Most — badem, slani rub, suha kora kruha i drveni tonovi spajaju kremu dima s vinom.
• Tempo — mali gutljaj prije dima, zatim duga pauza; prebrz ritam može napraviti gorčinu.

Kada ne radi
• Ako tražiš desertni dojam, bit će prestrogo.
• Ako cigara ima mnogo papra, sherry može djelovati tanko.
• Ako je vino prehladno, izgubit će orašasti most koji drži cijeli stol.
body.en:
This archetype works when the evening wants lightness without emptiness. A Connecticut wrapper brings cream, hay, almond and gentle cedar; amontillado answers with nutty dryness, a salty thread and quiet oxidation. Together they make a pairing that does not shout. It is best in the first half of the evening, before heavy food or after a light supper.

How to build it
• Cigar — mild to medium strength, pale wrapper, a format that does not run too long or heat too quickly.
• Drink — dry amontillado or a related oxidative sherry, lightly chilled, in a smaller glass.
• Bridge — almond, salty edge, dry bread crust and wood tones connect the creamy smoke to the wine.
• Pace — a small sip before the smoke, then a long pause; rushing can turn the table bitter.

When it fails
• If you want a dessert impression, it will feel too strict.
• If the cigar carries a lot of pepper, the sherry may seem thin.
• If the wine is too cold, it loses the nutty bridge that holds the table together.

title.hr: Maduro i tawny: tamno, slatko, odmjereno
title.en: Maduro and tawny: dark, sweet, measured

body.hr:
Maduro i tawny porto izgledaju očito, ali dobar rezultat traži mjeru. Maduro često nosi kakao, melasu, kavu i vlažnu zemlju; tawny daje orahe, suho voće, karamelu i toplinu bez grubog alkohola. Cilj nije napraviti šećernu bombu, nego pronaći tamnu slatkoću koja ima rub i dovoljno kiseline.

Kako ga složiti
• Cigara — srednje do puno tijelo, zreliji tamni wrapper, manje agresivna snaga nego što boja sugerira.
• Piće — tawny porto s naglaskom na orašastom i suhom voću, ne prevelika čaša.
• Most — kakao, prženi lješnjak, datulja i karamela stvaraju zajedničku tamnu jezgru.
• Tempo — gutljaj neka bude manji od dima; porto se lako pretvori u glavni lik.

Kada ne radi
• Ako je cigara vrlo nikotinska, slatkoća može postati ljepljiva.
• Ako je porto premlad i jednostavno sladak, nestaje orašasti sloj.
• Ako se pairing vuče predugo, zadnja trećina može postati teška; voda je obavezna.
body.en:
Maduro and tawny port look obvious, but the good version needs restraint. Maduro often carries cocoa, molasses, coffee and damp earth; tawny brings nuts, dried fruit, caramel and warmth without rough alcohol. The goal is not a sugar bomb, but dark sweetness with an edge and enough acidity.

How to build it
• Cigar — medium to full body, a mature dark wrapper, less aggressive strength than the colour may suggest.
• Drink — tawny port led by nuts and dried fruit, served in a modest pour.
• Bridge — cocoa, roasted hazelnut, date and caramel create a shared dark centre.
• Pace — keep each sip smaller than the smoke; port can easily become the main character.

When it fails
• If the cigar is very nicotine-forward, sweetness can become sticky.
• If the port is young and simply sweet, the nutty layer disappears.
• If the pairing runs too long, the final third may feel heavy; water is essential.

title.hr: Jamajka esteri i puniji wrapper: voćna buka pod kontrolom
title.en: Jamaican esters and a fuller wrapper: controlled fruit noise

body.hr:
Jamajčanski esteri mogu biti banana, ananas, lak, maslina, melasa i visoki tonovi koji plešu iznad čaše. Puniji wrapper daje zemlju, kakao, papar i strukturu. Dobar stol nastaje kad se rum ne pokušava ukrotiti, nego dobiva cigaru dovoljno široku da ga primi bez borbe.

Kako ga složiti
• Cigara — srednje puno tijelo, habano ili tamniji wrapper, dovoljno cedra i zemlje da drži ritam.
• Piće — jamajčanski stil s jasnim esterima, po mogućnosti s kapljicom vode ako alkohol nosi previše visine.
• Most — melasa, prezrelo voće, koža, kakao i začin povezuju voćnu aromu s punijim dimom.
• Tempo — prvo pomiriši rum, zatim dim; ako krene preglasno, voda između vraća nepce.

Kada ne radi
• Ako je cigara blaga i kremasta, rum će je pregaziti.
• Ako je rum serviran pretoplo, esteri mogu djelovati kao otapalo umjesto kao voće.
• Ako oba elementa imaju puno papra, stol postaje napet, ne energičan.
body.en:
Jamaican esters can mean banana, pineapple, varnish, olive, molasses and high tones dancing above the glass. A fuller wrapper gives earth, cocoa, pepper and structure. The table works when the rum is not tamed, but given a cigar broad enough to receive it without a fight.

How to build it
• Cigar — medium-full body, habano or darker wrapper, enough cedar and earth to hold the rhythm.
• Drink — Jamaican style with clear esters, with a drop of water if the alcohol carries too much height.
• Bridge — molasses, overripe fruit, leather, cocoa and spice connect the fruity aroma to fuller smoke.
• Pace — nose the rum first, then smoke; if it gets too loud, water between steps resets the palate.

When it fails
• If the cigar is mild and creamy, the rum will run over it.
• If the rum is served too warm, esters can read as solvent rather than fruit.
• If both sides carry heavy pepper, the table becomes tense, not energetic.

title.en: Agricole and citrus: the green edge

body.hr:
Agricole stil donosi travu, svježu trsku, bijeli papar i mineralnost. Uz citrus ne tražiš koktel od soka, nego aromatski smjer: korica limete, grejp, malo svježine u serviranju i cigaru koja se ne boji zelenog ruba. Ovaj arhetip čisti nepce i dobro radi kad je večer topla ili hrana masnija.

Kako ga složiti
• Cigara — svjetliji do srednji wrapper, biljni ili cedar profil, bez previše kakaa i melase.
• Piće — agricole rum, čisto ili s vrlo jednostavnim citrusnim naglaskom koji ne skriva destilat.
• Most — trava, limetina korica, bijeli papar, svježi badem i suhi cedar.
• Tempo — neka piće bude hladnije od teških destilata, ali ne ledeno; aroma mora ostati čitljiva.

Kada ne radi
• Ako je cigara jako slatka ili tamna, citrus može zvučati odvojeno.
• Ako citrus dominira, pairing postaje napitak uz cigaru, ne razgovor.
• Ako tražiš zimski, kožni dojam, ovaj stol može biti previše živahan.
body.en:
Agricole style brings grass, fresh cane, white pepper and minerality. With citrus, the goal is not juice, but direction: lime zest, grapefruit, a little freshness in service and a cigar that is not afraid of a green edge. This archetype cleans the palate and works well on warm evenings or with richer food.

How to build it
• Cigar — pale to medium wrapper, herbal or cedar profile, without too much cocoa or molasses.
• Drink — agricole rum, neat or with a very simple citrus accent that does not hide the spirit.
• Bridge — grass, lime peel, white pepper, fresh almond and dry cedar.
• Pace — serve it cooler than heavy spirits, but not icy; the aroma must remain readable.

When it fails
• If the cigar is very sweet or dark, citrus can sound detached.
• If citrus dominates, the pairing becomes a drink beside a cigar, not a conversation.
• If you want a wintery leather impression, this table may feel too lively.

title.hr: Treset i jaka kubanka: dim protiv dima
title.en: Peat and a strong Cuban: smoke against smoke

body.hr:
Ovo je večer za oprezne korake. Tresetni whisky nosi dim, jod, pepeo, more i ulje; jača kubanska cigara može donijeti zemlju, kožu, papar i koncentriranu drvenu gorčinu. Uspjeh nije u tome da jedno pobijedi drugo, nego da dimovi imaju različite oblike: jedan morski i hladan, drugi topao i zemljan.

Kako ga složiti
• Cigara — puna ili jača, ali dobro odležana, s ravnim izgaranjem i bez vlažne grubosti.
• Piće — peat stil s kapljicom vode, ne prevelika mjera i ne prejaka čaša na početku.
• Most — pepeo, koža, sol, tamni kruh, stari hrast i zemlja.
• Tempo — jedna trećina cigare može biti dovoljna za glavni test; ne moraš forsirati cijelu večer.

Kada ne radi
• Ako je cigara mlada i amonijačna, treset će naglasiti manu.
• Ako je whisky visokog alkohola bez vode, nepce se brzo umori.
• Ako gosti nisu navikli na dim, ovaj arhetip zatvara stol umjesto da ga otvara.
body.en:
This is an evening for careful steps. Peated whisky carries smoke, iodine, ash, sea and oil; a stronger Cuban cigar can bring earth, leather, pepper and concentrated woody bitterness. Success is not one side defeating the other, but the smokes having different shapes: one maritime and cold, the other warm and earthy.

How to build it
• Cigar — full or strong, but well rested, with even burn and without damp harshness.
• Drink — peated style with a drop of water, a modest pour and not the strongest glass at the start.
• Bridge — ash, leather, salt, dark bread, old oak and earth.
• Pace — one third of the cigar may be enough for the main test; the whole evening does not need forcing.

When it fails
• If the cigar is young and ammoniac, peat will underline the flaw.
• If the whisky is high proof without water, the palate tires quickly.
• If guests are not used to smoke, this archetype closes the table instead of opening it.

title.hr: Espresso i kratka vitola: završni akord
title.en: Espresso and a short vitola: the closing chord

body.hr:
Nije svaka večer za dugo sjedenje. Espresso i kratka vitola daju završni akord: koncentrirano, toplo, jasno i dovoljno kratko da ne razbije san. Kava donosi gorčinu, kremu, pržene note i malo kiselosti; kratka cigara traži pažljivo paljenje jer nema mnogo prostora za ispravak.

Kako ga složiti
• Cigara — kratki format, blaga do srednja snaga za radni dan ili puniji format samo nakon hrane.
• Piće — espresso ili ristretto bez puno mlijeka; šećer samo ako ga koristiš kao svjestan most.
• Most — kava, kakao, tost, lješnjak, krema i blagi drveni ton.
• Tempo — pusti cigaru da se smiri nakon paljenja; espresso pij u dva do tri mala koraka.

Kada ne radi
• Ako je kava spaljena, cijeli pairing djeluje grubo.
• Ako je vitola prekratka i prejaka, nikotin stiže prije okusa.
• Ako je cilj duga meditacija, ovaj arhetip je previše rezan i završni.
body.en:
Not every evening is made for a long seat. Espresso and a short vitola give a closing chord: concentrated, warm, clear and short enough not to break sleep. Coffee brings bitterness, crema, roasted notes and a little acidity; a short cigar needs careful lighting because it leaves little room for correction.

How to build it
• Cigar — short format, mild to medium strength for a weekday, or a fuller format only after food.
• Drink — espresso or ristretto without much milk; sugar only if you use it as a deliberate bridge.
• Bridge — coffee, cocoa, toast, hazelnut, crema and a gentle wood tone.
• Pace — let the cigar settle after lighting; drink the espresso in two or three small steps.

When it fails
• If the coffee is scorched, the whole pairing feels rough.
• If the vitola is both very short and very strong, nicotine arrives before flavour.
• If the goal is long meditation, this archetype is too cut and final.
